message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

title Keyple 2.0 - Adapter of keyple-service-resource-java-lib - 2.0.0 (21/06/2021)

legend top center
  Colors legend :
  • External public API references :
  • <color:goldenrod>**calypsonet-terminal-reader-java-api**</color>
  • <color:green>**keyple-service-java-lib**</color>
endlegend

package "org.eclipse.keyple.core.service.resource" {

  class "**final** CardResourceServiceProvider" as CardResourceServiceProvider <<C>> {
    ...
  }

  class "**final** CardResourceServiceAdapter" as CardResourceServiceAdapter <<C>> {
    <<CardResourceService>>
    <<**PluginObserverSpi**>>
    <<**CardReaderObserverSpi**>>
    --
    △ CardResourceServiceAdapter getInstance ()
    △ String getCardResourceInfo (CardResource cardResource)
    ..
    △ ReaderManagerAdapter getReaderManager (<color:goldenrod>Reader</color> reader)
    △ void registerPoolCardResource (CardResource cardResource, <color:green>PoolPlugin</color> poolPlugin)
    △ void configure (CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter configurator)
    ..
    CardResourceService
    ● CardResourceServiceConfigurator getConfigurator()
    ● MinimalCardResourceServiceConfigurator getMinimalConfigurator()
    ● void start ()
    ● void stop ()
    ● CardResource getCardResource (String cardResourceProfileName)
    ● CardResource getCardResource ()
    ● void releaseCardResource (CardResource cardResource)
    ● void removeCardResource (CardResource cardResource)
    ..
    PluginObserverSpi
    ● void onPluginEvent (<color:green>PluginEvent</color> pluginEvent)
    ..
    CardReaderObserverSpi
    ● void onReaderEvent (<color:goldenrod>**CardReaderEvent**</color> readerEvent)
  }

  class "**final** CardProfileManagerAdapter" as CardProfileManagerAdapter <<C>> {
    △ CardProfileManagerAdapter(CardProfile cardProfile,\n    CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter globalConfiguration)
    ..
    △ void removeCardResource (CardResource cardResource)
    △ void onReaderConnected (ReaderManagerAdapter readerManager)
    △ void onCardInserted (ReaderManagerAdapter readerManager)
    △ CardResource getCardResource ()
  }

  class "**final** ReaderManagerAdapter" as ReaderManagerAdapter <<C>> {
    △ ReaderManagerAdapter (<color:goldenrod>Reader</color> reader, <color:green>Plugin</color> plugin,\n    ReaderConfiguratorSpi readerConfiguratorSpi, int usageTimeoutMillis)
    --
    △ <color:goldenrod>Reader</color> getReader ()
    △ <color:green>Plugin</color> getPlugin ()
    △ Set<CardResource> getCardResources ()
    △ boolean isActive ()
    ..
    △ void activate ()
    △ CardResource matches (CardResourceProfileExtension extension)
    △ boolean lock (CardResource cardResource, CardResourceProfileExtension extension)
    △ void unlock ()
    △ void removeCardResource (CardResource cardResource)
  }

  class "**final** CardResourceAdapter" as CardResourceAdapter <<C>> {
    <<CardResource>>
    △ CardResource (<color:goldenrod>**CardReader**</color> reader, <color:goldenrod>**SmartCard**</color> smartCard)
    ..
    CardResource
    ● <color:goldenrod>**CardReader**</color> getReader ()
    ● <color:goldenrod>**SmartCard**</color> getSmartCard ()
  }

  class "**final** CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter" as CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapterLeft <<C>> {
    <<CardResourceServiceConfigurator>>
    <<MinimalCardResourceServiceConfigurator>>
    <<AllocationStrategyStep>>
    <<UsageTimeoutStep>>
    <<PluginStep>>
    <<PluginMonitoringStep>>
    <<PoolAllocationStrategyStep>>
    <<PoolPluginStep>>
    <<AllocationTimingParameterStep>>
    <<ProfileStep>>
    <<ProfileParameterStep>>
    <<ConfigurationStep>>
    **final** CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter
    --
    △ CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter ()
    ...
    ..
    **CardResourceServiceConfigurator**
    ...
    ..
    **MinimalCardResourceServiceConfigurator**
    ...
  }

}

' External adapter classes (outside package)
class "CardResourceServiceAdapter" as CardResourceServiceAdapterExt <<C>> #lightcyan
class "CardResourceAdapter" as CardResourceAdapterExt <<C>> #lightcyan
class "CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter" as CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapterExt <<C>> #lightcyan
class "ReaderManagerAdapter" as ReaderManagerAdapterExt <<C>> #lightcyan
class "CardProfileManagerAdapter" as CardProfileManagerAdapterExt <<C>> #lightcyan

CardResourceServiceProvider --> CardResourceServiceAdapter : provide

CardResourceServiceAdapter "1" --> "0..N" ReaderManagerAdapter
CardResourceServiceAdapter "1" --> "1" CardProfileManagerAdapter

CardProfileManagerAdapter "1" --> "0..N" CardResourceAdapter : create for pool plugin
ReaderManagerAdapter "1" --> "0..N" CardResourceAdapter : create for regular plugin

@enduml
```
